introSection: Serial Serpent is an E&F Miler Industries Kiddie roller coaster located at Funtimes Fun Park in Alliance, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders. Serial Serpent has a snake-shaped train.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On April 2, 2011, a 3-year-old boy was killed after being struck by the train after falling from the ride. An investigation found that he did not meet the height requirement for the roller coaster.

fullText:
Serial Serpent is an E&F Miler Industries Kiddie roller coaster located at Funtimes Fun Park in Alliance, Ohio, USA.



Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders. Serial Serpent has a snake-shaped train.

On April 2, 2011, a 3-year-old boy was killed after being struck by the train after falling from the ride. An investigation found that he did not meet the height requirement for the roller coaster.
